evidence.quote: Muralidharan et al. developed nanoparticle siRNA targeting HuR and tested its efficacy in H1299 and CCD16 cells... HuR expression was significantly decreased in cells treated with siRNA.
100. Muralidharan R... Folate receptor-targeted nanoparticle delivery of HuR-RNAi suppresses lung cancer cell proliferation and migration.

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: Recently, the nanoparticle HuR siRNA has also been treated in melanoma cells and has achieved specific curative effects [101].

issues.reason: Text specifies 'melanoma cells' generally without specific cell line names.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Specify 'melanoma cells' as general type unless specific lines are found in Ref [101].

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: siHuR significantly enhanced epirubicinmediated apoptosis by increasing reactive oxygen species, thereby promoting the cytotoxic effect of epirubicin [74].
74. Lin G-L... Modulation of the mRNA-binding protein HuR as a novel reversal mechanism of epirubicin-triggered multidrug resistance in colorectal cancer cells.

issues.reason: Body text on p2 does not specify cell type; derived from Reference [74] title.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Clarify that cell type is inferred from Reference [74].

evidence.quote: Studies have shown that MS-444 inhibits HuR cytoplasmic translocation in human glioblastoma cells and colorectal cancer cells... pretreatment of pancreatic cancer cells with the HuR small molecule inhibitor MS-444 (Novartis) significantly improved TRAIL sensitivity [92].

MS-444 inhibits HuR cytoplasmic translocation, abolishes hypoxia-induced PIM1 overexpression, and significantly improves the sensitivity of pancreatic cancer cells to oxaliplatin and 5-FU under hypoxic conditions [93].
treatment of Hep3B cells with N-benzylcantharidinamide reduced MMP-9 mRNA stability, which was also achieved by inhibiting HuR cytoplasmic relocation [106].
cytoskeletal inhibitors latrunculin A and blebbistatin dose and time dependently reduce the cytoplasmic expression of HuR in HepG2 and Huh7 cell lines [107, 108].

FDA-approved pyrvinium pamoate, an anthelmintic drug that inhibits HuR cytoplasmic accumulation, is used in combination with chemotherapy drugs such as cisplatin, doxorubicin, vincristine, and oxaliplatin to enhance chemotherapeutic effects on tumor cell cytotoxicity [20].

Treatment of non-small cell lung cancer cells with CMLD-2 produced dose-dependent cytotoxicity, which reduced HuR mRNA and HuR regulatory protein (Bcl2 and p27) mRNA... [111]. MAD2 was one of the targets of HuR and MAD2 protein levels decreased significantly after treatment with CMLD-2 [110].

step_scores.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: KH-3, a small-molecule compound, can lead to breast cancer invasion by inhibiting the interaction of HuR with FOXQ1 mRNA [112].
112. Wu X... Targeting the interaction between RNA-binding protein HuR and FOXQ1 suppresses breast cancer invasion and metastasis.

issues.claim: KH-3 can lead to breast cancer invasion
issues.reason: Source body text (p11) says 'lead to', but Reference [112] title (p14) says 'suppresses'. Internal paper conflict.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Correct observation to 'suppresses breast cancer invasion' based on Reference [112] title and logical context of inhibitors.

evidence.quote: quercetin, as a monomer of traditional Chinese medicine, can destroy the stability of the binding of the HuR protein to mRNA [36, 42, 113].
cryptotanshinone, can destabilize TNF-α mRNA and reduce drug resistance of tumor cells by reducing HuR nucleocytoplasmic transfer [60].
